channel.title: qwertymarmot.github.io
channel.description: Sharing knowledge is the most fundamental act of friendship. Because it is a way you can give something without loosing something by Richard Stallman

item.title: How to manage the stress of many committments
item.description:
Notes:

In order to manage stress of multiple commitments on our minds we must capture them, define what they mean to us, and then determine the next action that we need to take on them.

Source:

Allen, D. (2002). Getting Things Done: The Art of Stress-Free Productivity (Reprint edition). Penguin Books.
